action.reasoning: Observation: 20-epoch model with focal loss got test=0.4563 vs 5-epoch model's 0.6199. More training = worse generalization. The model is severely overfitting to source domains. Analysis: Need to reduce overfitting. Strategy: (1) Use CLIP ViT-B/16 which has better zero-shot generalization, (2) Freeze most of backbone, only fine-tune last 2 transformer blocks + head, (3) Use simple weighted CE with label smoothing instead of focal loss, (4) Use weighted random sampler for class balance, (5) Lower LR. The 5-epoch model was better because less fine-tuning preserved generalizable features. Decision: Rewrite model.py to use CLIP, update train.py with frozen backbone strategy.
